sentence: It was easy for Joel but not Kevin to have fun on the camping trip because _ learned early how to enjoy the outdoors.
The snow came down so much that Michael had to go plow Kevins driveway because _ agreed to take care of his neighbors.
The mirror didn't lie when it showed how overweight Patricia was and how emaciated Felicia was, so _ needed to go on diet.
Randy only ever added a little bit of hot sauce to his food, especially compared to Adam, as _ was much more sensitive to spice.
While at the store, Logan grabbed a head of lettuce for Eric to use for dinner because _ knew there was none at home.
Samuel was blown away to find out from Lawrence that goldfish are a type of carp, so _ decided to fact check his friend.
Nick did not like sauces made from tomato, only creamy sauces. Ryan knew this so he only made white sauce when _ came over.
After a boring meeting, Monica closed her eyes and dozed while Carrie took a walk, as _ had gone to bed late the night before.
Going to a restaurant is something that Patricia does very often but Carrie rarely goes to one because _ is a very bad cook.
Lawrence shovelled their driveway after the snow storm while Aaron avoided doing so, so _ had a driveway that was free from snow.
At their high school's homecoming dance, Natalie stayed on the floor for the slow dance while Maria got food during it, because _ currently had a significant other.
Derrick spent the entire summer laying on the hot beach, while Jeffrey spent the summer indoors, so _ 's hair had more sun damage.
Emily asked her sister Sarah if she needed any tampons or pads from the store, even though _ didn't because she had switched to using menstrual cups.
Brian could learn to swim with the right instruction, but it was hard to tell whether lifeguard Matthew was qualified to provide it, since _ had never swum before.
Monica was worried that Mary might be caught in a scam when they started their new job, but _ decided to trust their friend's judgement.
After Samuel won the cherry jam contest, Kyle still believed they should have won since _ sweetened with high calorie sweetener and the judges went by taste.
All the clutter in the house excited Leslie but not Derrick because cleaning energized _ very much.
Hunter bought a vehicle to commute in but not Dennis because _ had a driving distance to work.
Brian wanted to be a home based administrative assistant and Kenneth didn't because _ liked staying at home.
After Logan contracted the chickenpox from Joseph so _ spent the day sending mean texts about it.
The apartment Brett rented was owned by Jason, so _ sent the rent for the apartment each month.
Police arrested Maria but let Cynthia go as _ had some paint on their hand from the spray paint used for graffiti.
Derrick really liked working in Human Resources and William wanted to work at the same company, and _ subsequently offered a position.
Hunter gave Justin two weeks to respond after sending him a demand letter. .After that _ will sue him in the court.
Brian taught Michael how to feed a rabbit greens because _ had rabbits as a kid.
Adam found the blue joke that Steven offensive, because _ was aware of their own privilege.
Elena is concerned that Megan might have a Twitter addiction, but _ is probably worrying about nothing.
Mary wanted to surprise Cynthia with a puppy for Christmas, so _ asked about allergies to dogs.
Joseph has an allergy to mangoes, but Nelson does not, so _ has to be very careful.
Hunter likes tulips and Ryan does not, so _ went to buy some from the store.
Amy went over to the waiting room at the hospital to calm Samantha because _ was placid.
There was more shade in the yard of Christine than there was in the yard of Victoria because _ had more plants.
Brian wanted a horse but not Nick because _ raised cattle in their spare time.
Eric looked at Neil in shock and started to react violently because _ felt betrayed.
Brett asked Nelson where they were because _ had no idea after he fell asleep.
Jeffrey believed Robert was spying on him during the private event, because _ was paranoid.
Ryan was always behind Donald in high school because _ had a diagnosed learning disability.
Rebecca slept in the hammock in the backyard while Tanya gardened because _ was tired.
Matthew wants to sell Kevin tickets to the football game because _ needs the money.
Nelson teased Christopher about needing to find a homecoming date because _ already had one.
Sarah was a much better surgeon than Maria so _ always got the harder cases.
Nelson went to the doctors office without Dennis because _ had to change his prescription.
Brian's plants are showing a lot more growth than Logan's, because _ used better fertilizer.
Eric was easier to amuse than Justin because _ had a great sense of humor.
Jessica was fatter than Rebecca because _ ate chocolate almost every day as a snack.
Elena waited patiently for Angela, as _ arrived early to meet at their prearranged spot.
Jason denied Ian's passport application because _ did not receive the correct paperwork in time.
Dennis made their weight loss goal before Eric, because _ only ate a healthy diet.
Kyle was more comfortable speaking in front of large groups than Nick, because _ was not able to take public speaking courses in college.
Erin was self-conscious of her legs and Katrina didn't help by making fun of them, but _ went to the gym to try and help her.
Elena was an excellent flight attendant when Sarah boarded the plane with a fear of flying because, _ was able to overcome their fears.

It is likely that Donald but not Jason would get the job promotion because _ never stayed late and never did extra work.
Lawrence shovelled their driveway after the snow storm while Aaron avoided doing so, so _ had a driveway that was covered in snow.
Amy hated the smell of bleach, but still Kayla used it all the time to clean so _ tries to use it less.
It was easy for Joel but not Kevin to have fun on the camping trip because _ had not learned how to enjoy the outdoors.
At their high school's homecoming dance, Natalie stayed on the floor for the slow dance while Maria got food during it, because _ had broken up with her significant other.
Derrick needed Kenneth to go to the store and get a baby bib, but _ said the one they had was still ok.
After a boring meeting, Monica closed her eyes and dozed while Carrie took a walk, as _ had gone to bed early the night before.
Emily asked her sister Sarah if she needed any tampons or pads from the store, but _ didn't because she had switched to using menstrual cups.

After Samuel won the cherry jam contest, Kyle still believed they should have won since _ sweetened with low calorie sweetener and the judges went by taste.
Steven asked Joseph to have their stomach examined after _ had a night full of really bad gas issues.
Randy is better at playing pretend with kids than Kenneth because _ is a more serious person.
Katrina turned out to be much more spoiled than Felicia because _ did not have wealthy or generous parents.
At work, Mary uses a broiler a lot, but Rebecca uses a chainsaw. That's because _ is a tree cutter.
Jennifer returned the pan to Sarah because _ had loaned it to her for the potluck party.
Megan forgot to buy deodorant at the store so they borrowed Jessica's deodorant and _ never found out.
Matthew spent the weekend watching a baby while Benjamin was on vacation, and _ made sure their vacation was relaxing.
Brett was actively engaged in weight loss whereas Benjamin was trying to gain weight, so _ maximized their caloric intake.
Logan reads a lot, while Donald almost never picks up a book because _ is a plumber.
Katrina's being taught how to speak Korean by Felicia, so _ was most likely born in Korea.
Monica can speak English and German but Samantha can only speak English because _ is trilingual.
Erin was eating more than Betty was eating for dinner because _ had a big lunch.
Amy recognized the man in the waiting room before Monica did, because _ had met the man only once.
Jason was bald, but Hunter had a full head of hair, so _ needed to buy hair gel.

Sarah was quickly promoted to manager over Kayla, because _ excelled at angering other people.

Megan focused less on proper posture than Lindsey because _ wanted to become a model.
Robert helped create an internet viral video sensation of Kyle when _ danced in video.
Benjamin lied to Logan because _ was so upset about the money that was missing.
Jeffrey believed Robert was spying on him during the private event, because _ was sneaky.
Michael discovered Craig was a respected doctor so _ was asked many health related questions.
Kyle asked Brett for some tips on healthy eating because _ has recently lost weight.
Jessica was thinner than Rebecca because _ ate chocolate almost every day as a snack.
Jennifer was better at playing sports than Laura was although _ was much more athletic.
Brett took more medicines than Aaron did although _ was suffering from many more diseases.
Katrina sells Maria a rug at the local flea market because _ is a customer.
Kyle wanted to write to Aaron every day, because _ enjoyed receiving letters from friends.
The plan devised by Christine to get Kayla to like them failed, as _ did not really try it.
The girl broke Leslie's heart but not Kenneth's because _ used to be in love with her.
Betty is known as bilingual while Rachel is known as multilingual because _ can speak more than two languages.
The cake that Lawrence tried to bake for Ryan didn't rise, and _ felt forgiving abut it.
